title: crangonorchis pedoglossa
side_effects: Crangonorchis pedoglossa can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and stomach upset. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant has been linked to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of bleeding and bruising. Additionally, some individuals may experience allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and swelling. In severe cases, improper use of Crangonorchis pedoglossa can lead to respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and wheezing.
